headline: This Dow 30 dividend stock is up 100% in the past year
summary: It doesn't happen often. A 100-year-old machinery company doesn't usually double in a year. But Caterpillar isn't your grandfather's tractor maker anymore, at least not entirely. The dividend stock has surged roughly 100% over the past 12 months, making it one of the best performers in the Dow ...

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Surges 700 Points On Trump's Iran Comments; Nvidia Stock Climbs (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes surged Monday as President Donald Trump announced productive peace talks with Iran. Nvidia was an early winner on the stock market today, as it looked to bounce back from recent losses.

headline: Toyota to invest $1 billion to increase U.S. production in Kentucky, Indiana plants
summary: Toyota on Monday announced $1 billion in investments in two U.S. plants as part of a plan to invest up to $10 billion domestically over the next five years.
